completed_tasks.name: Resume + ship v1.2 -> main (git-flow, tag v1.2.0, push, GitHub release Latest)
Fix live trailer animation (routeId->[0,0], simClock snap, distance-based ETA) + tests
feat: 64x max speed + fleetPerSpoke + optimizer-cadence gate + tests

remaining_tasks.name: USER-DIRECTED paced-loop redesign: fixed wall cadence (advance simClock by simSpeed*elapsed, batch sim-events in window) + DEBOUNCED off-path optimizer; then demo FLEET_PER_SPOKE=3 verify 27 trucks @ 64x

decisions.decision: Trailer keyframe routeId must be the /api/routes geometry key (route-FROM-TO), not the tripId
decisions.rationale: client looks up route polyline by routeId; tripId missed -> trailers stuck at [0,0]

decisions.decision: simClock.resync snaps on corrections > maxNudge (was clamp-only)
decisions.rationale: simMs:0 snapshot anchor never caught up to absolute-epoch ticks -> trailers frozen at fraction 0

decisions.decision: fleetPerSpoke config defaults to 1 (byte-identical golden); demo defaults to 3
decisions.rationale: preserve determinism keystone while enabling more trucks

decisions.decision: ACCEPTED (next session): rewrite paced loop to fixed cadence + debounced optimizer
decisions.rationale: current loop ties tick cadence to speed and runs optimizer per-tick -> sim-loop-bound; >9 trucks freeze and 64x is moot (compute-bound)

uncommitted_files: demo-*.png x9 (throwaway debug screenshots in repo root, untracked, safe to delete)
next_action: Implement the paced-loop redesign in packages/api/src/sim/driver.ts (driveSimulationPaced) + speed-controller.ts: FIXED wall cadence (~250ms-1s); each tick advances a sim-clock cursor by simSpeed*wallElapsed and processes all sim-events with occurredAt<=cursor in one batch, broadcasting once/tick; tickIntervalMs becomes the fixed cadence and simSpeed the lever. Replace optimizerEveryTicks with a DEBOUNCED, off-event-path optimizer (>=once per trailing ~500ms-1s quiet window). Keep determinism goldens green (default config byte-identical). Then FLEET_PER_SPOKE=3 and verify 27 trucks glide at 64x. Full plan + run commands + the @mm/simulation must-rebuild-dist gotcha are in .continue-here.md.
context_notes: v1.2 fully RELEASED & public (main=6f61884 / v1.2.0). Branches develop+main only; develop=e000a89 in sync with origin. Demo run: docker compose up -d; DATABASE_URL=postgres://mm:mm@localhost:5432/mm SIM_TICKS=20000 FLEET_PER_SPOKE=1 pnpm --filter @mm/api demo (:3001) + pnpm --filter @mm/web dev (:5173). KEY GOTCHA: api (tsx) imports @mm/simulation from compiled dist -> run pnpm build after any engine.ts edit. ~15-20s first-tick warmup; sim then ~5 ticks/sec at fleet=1. fleet 2-3 currently freeze the sim (the reason for the redesign).
